scripts.db:init: docker compose up -d postgres && node scripts/wait-for-db.mjs && echo "Database ready (schema from database/init.sql on first boot)."
scripts.deps:frontend:container: docker compose run --rm frontend npm install --workspace=frontend
scripts.deps:backend:container: docker compose run --rm backend npm install --workspace=backend
scripts.deps:container:ci: docker compose run --rm frontend npm ci
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=frontend && dotenv -e .env -- npm run test --workspace=backend
scripts.test:integration: docker compose up -d postgres && node scripts/wait-for-db.mjs && dotenv -e .env -- npm run test --workspace=backend
scripts.clean: docker compose down -v --rmi local 2>/dev/null; npm run clean:artifacts
scripts.clean:artifacts: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/.next backend/dist backend/coverage frontend/coverage
